title: Pluribus
description: In a world overtaken by a mysterious wave of forced happiness, Carol Sturka, one of the immune few, must uncover what's really going on - and save humanity from its artificial bliss.

episodes.title: We Is Us
episodes.description: An astronomer's discovery turns the planet upside-down; curmudgeonly novelist Carol Sturka is terrified by this strange new world.

episodes.title: Pirate Lady
episodes.description: A curiously familiar face introduces Carol to the bizarre new normal. A gathering in Europe brings strangers together...and causes friction.

episodes.title: Grenade
episodes.description: The World just wants to help - which infuriates Carol. A heart-to-heart conversation ends with a bang.

episodes.title: Please, Carol
episodes.description: Carol tests the boundaries of this weirdly honest world at the expense of her ego. Far away, a resolute individual learns he's not alone.

episodes.title: Got Milk
episodes.description: Carol doubles down on her investigation -- loneliness be damned. Meanwhile, howls in the night reveal a new source of danger.

episodes.title: HDP
episodes.description: Carol shares a horrific discovery and learns new truths in the process. Mr. Diabaté lives life to the fullest in Sin City.

episodes.title: The Gap
episodes.description: Manousos begins a dangerous trek to meet Carol. Returning home from Las Vegas, Carol gets creative with her rebellion.

episodes.title: Charm Offensive
episodes.description: Carol takes a different tack with The Others and discovers more than she anticipated. Manousos awakens in unfamiliar surroundings.

episodes.title: La Chica o El Mundo
episodes.description: Manousos arrives in Albuquerque and complications ensue. Carol visits the last best place on Earth.
